title: The model table now explains itself
summary:
A model-focused day: clearer access and copy controls in the dashboard, plus GPT Realtime 2.1 as the new default.

Model browsing got less archaeological: compact Quest/Paid labels now stay beside model names, tooltips explain the rules, descriptions live in hover cards instead of clogging the table, and clicking a name or ID copies the exact model identifier. Mobile usage estimates also now say gen/pollen, because units should not require divination.

Realtime API builders now land on GPT Realtime 2.1 by default, using a verified Azure Realtime deployment for session creation. GPT Realtime 2 remains available for anyone keeping an older setup alive.

The project homepage's Latest News section was refreshed so visitors and contributors get a current view of what is happening in the open.
